# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_trafficmanagerendpoint (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the endpoint.
- `profile_name` (String) Name of Traffic Manager profile where this endpoints attaches to.
- `resource_group` (String) Name of a resource group where the Traffic Manager endpoint exists or will be created.
- `type` (String) The type of the endpoint.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enabled` (Boolean) The status of the endpoint.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `geo_mapping` (String) The list of countries/regions mapped to this endpoint when traffic manager profile has routing_method of `geographic`.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `location` (String) Specifies the location of the external or nested endpoints when using the 'Performance' traffic routing method.
- `min_child_endpoints` (Number) The minimum number of endpoints that must be available in the child profile in order for the parent profile to be considered available. Only applicable to endpoint of *type=nested_endpoints*.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `priority` (Number) The priority of this endpoint when traffic manager profile has routing_method of *priority*. Possible values are from 1 to 1000, lower values represent higher priority. This is an optional parameter. If specified, it must be specified on all endpoints. No two endpoints can share the same priority value.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the Traffic Manager endpoint. Use `present` to create or update a Traffic Manager endpoint and `absent` to delete it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `target` (String) The fully-qualified DNS name of the endpoint.
- `target_resource_id` (String) The Azure Resource URI of the of the endpoint. Not applicable to endpoints of *type=external_endpoints*.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `weight` (Number) The weight of this endpoint when traffic manager profile has routing_method of `weighted`. Possible values are from 1 to 1000.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
